scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w @strabon/server" "npm run dev -w @strabon/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @strabon/shared && npm run build -w @strabon/db && npm run build -w @strabon/server && npm run build -w @strabon/web
scripts.typecheck: tsc --build packages/shared packages/db packages/server packages/web packages/scripts
